Defendant Colliers International Ca, Inc.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Text Ruling

Defendant Colliers International Ca, Inc.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Defendant Colliers International Ca, Inc.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is taken under submission as of today.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Biederman of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith, LLP telephone number 415-421-3400 for Plaintiff Vikki Johnson.
Tracy Thompson of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP telephone number 415-276-6564 for Defendant Colliers International CA, Inc.

Counsel presented argument and their views as to possible solutions with respect to handling of the eight claims. DEFENDANT COLLIERS INTERNATIONAL CA, INC.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to December 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 for the Court to provide a ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Continued To Dec-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dana Andreoli of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP telephone number 415-421-3400 for Plaintiff Vikki Johnson.
Tracy Thompson of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP telephone number 415-276-6564 for Defendant Colliers International CA, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT COLLIERS INTERNATIONAL CA, INC.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to December 2, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 for further briefing on the issue of whether the Labor claims alleged in the complaint is against the Armendariz case. Plaintiff is to file a brief by November 9, 2016. Defendant is to file a Response by November 23, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert/Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
